feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A15/18 and L104B03/08/09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 25, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 26, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09.

Start time : 25/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09 to L104B02/B06.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A04/05/07/08/10 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 24, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 25, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A04/05/07/08/10.

Start time : 24/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 25/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A04/05/07/08/10 to L104B05.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B06 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 23, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 24, 04:00 UTC

Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B06.

Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B06 to L104A01 L104A02 L104A03.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B05 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 22, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 23, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B05.

Start time : 22/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B05 to L104B01 L104B02 L104B03 L104B04.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Virtual Private Servers] - Instances operating system maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 14:00 - 16:00 UTC

Jun 5, 12:44 UTC
Update - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Virtual Private Servers offer for the EU and CA regions.

Start time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.

May 28, 12:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Virtual Private Servers offer for the EU and CA regions.

Start time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 9, 17:01 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer on racks 41H05, 41F02, 41G06, 41H06 and 41G07 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/06/2026 16:52 UTC
End time : 09/06/2026 16:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in racks 41H05, 41F02, 41G06, 41H06 and 41G07 were temporarily unable to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46K09 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 9, 15:17 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack 46K09 has been resolved.

Start time : 09/06/2026 11:22 UTC
End time : 09/06/2026 15:07 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 9, 14:28 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Customers are now able to access their servers via Public network.
However, vRack network is currently unavailable.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 9, 12:57 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack 46K09.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/06/2026 11:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public network.
vRack network is no longer impacted.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
However, customers are now able to access their servers via vRack network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 9, 11:33 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary issue in the Rack 46K09.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/06/2026 11:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public and vRack networks.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public and vRack networks located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Dedicated Servers] - Rack SBG0506A01A maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 9, 14:53 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 13:40 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 9, 13:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack SBG0506A01A.

Start time : 09/06/2026 06:50 UTC
End time : 09/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G104B06 maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 9, 14:26 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 8, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 09/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 09/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA4/6][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 10, 01:04 UTC
Update - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/06/2026 13:35 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 00:30 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 9, 22:00 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 9, 16:51 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Some instances are no longer impacted by the incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 9, 14:05 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer on the specific GRA4/6 regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/06/2026 13:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some instances in the GRA4/6 regions are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers instances located in the specified regions.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [DE1][Storage and Backups] - Block Storage incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 8, 08:27 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Block Storage offering has been resolved.

Start time : 06/06/2026 09:28 UTC
End time : 08/06/2026 08:15 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 6, 19:06 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Customers now have access to their Block servers again. However, they may temporarily experience performance degradation.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 6, 10:06 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Block Storage offering in the DE1 Region.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/06/2026 09:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Block Storage servers are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data and may experience degraded performance.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 6, 09:52 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Block Storage offering.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/06/2026 09:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Block Storage servers are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data and may experience degraded performance.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it. 

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
entry.content:

Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering in LIM region has been resolved.

Start time : 06/06/2026 05:35 UTC
End time : 06/06/2026 17:51 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 6, 13:29 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : VPS instances in the LIM region are operational again. However, the performance of these VPS instances may be temporarily degraded
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 6, 10:14 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in LIM region.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/06/2026 05:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some instances in the LIM region are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access instances located on the specified region.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Some racks incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 6, 17:59 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/06/2026 17:12 UTC
End time : 06/06/2026 17:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the racks 46H30 - 46H29 - 46H31 - 46G17 - 46G18 - 46G19 - 46G21 - 46G22 - 46G20 - 46D10 - 46G25 - 46G24 - 46G23 - 46G27 - 46D09 - 46G31 - 46G30 - 46H13 - 46G28 - 46G26 were no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.
